source: full_diagnostic.py (Fabric REST API + Python Client SDK)

text.value:
There was a technical issue retrieving the data for the top 5 campaigns by revenue using the available tools and tables (error with campaign data relationship).

What went wrong:
- The system was unable to join campaign send and order attribution data due to a technical mapping error.

What you can do next:
- Please try narrowing your request (e.g., ask for top campaigns by another metric: clicks, opens, or send volume).
- Alternatively, you might contact your data team to verify the link between marketing sends/campaigns and order attribution.

I cannot fabricate or guess these numbers due to anti-hallucination rules. If you have a different question, feel free to ask!

function.arguments: {"natural_language_description":"List the top 5 marketing campaigns by total attributed revenue in 2025. For each, provide campaign name, attributed revenue, sends, conversion rate (orders/sends), ROI ((revenue-cost)/cost), and indicate if any have negative ROI. Use marketing_campaigns, marketing_events, marketing_sends, marketing_audiences, and commerce_orders tables. Attribution = last-touch, within 14 days of send/open."}
function.name: generate.filename

last_error.message:
Failed to execute step (RAID: e416d803-4215-4f1d-99bc-2829949101a2). Error: Query (51, 37) The column '<oii>marketing_sends</oii>[<oii>campaign_id</oii>]' either doesn't exist or doesn't have a relationship to any table available in the current context.

Technical Details:
RootActivityId: 68b001cd-10d2-4e43-bc22-29d71791fed1
Date (UTC): 3/24/2026 7:37:43 PM

function.arguments:
{"datasource_name":"Marketing360_Model","datasource_type":"SemanticModel","datasource_artifact_id":"3d00aeaa-91b9-4567-9166-fa3fc8249e6f","datasource_workspace_id":"5fa6b81d-fabe-4363-ad3d-b09ef82d16f2","natural_language_query":"List the top 5 marketing campaigns by total attributed revenue in 2025. For each, provide campaign name, attributed revenue, sends, conversion rate (orders/sends), ROI ((revenue-cost)/cost), and indicate if any have negative ROI. Use marketing_campaigns, marketing_events, marketing_sends, marketing_audiences, and commerce_orders tables. Attribution = last-touch, within 14 days of send/open.","code":"```dax
// Top 5 marketing campaigns by total attributed revenue in 2025
// Attribution model: Last-touch (open/click) within 14 days before the order date.

DEFINE
  // Helper table for allowed event types in attribution (open, click)
  VAR _EventTypes =
    DATATABLE(
      "event_type",
      STRING,
      {
        { "open" },
        { "click" }
      }
    )

  // Orders in 2025 (completed only)
  VAR _Orders2025 =
    FILTER(
      ALL('orders'),
      YEAR('orders'[order_at]) = 2025
        && 'orders'[status] = "completed"
    )

  // Add last-touch attributed campaign id to each 2025 order
  VAR _AttributedOrders =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      _Orders2025,
      "AttributedCampaignId",
        VAR _OrderDate = 'orders'[order_at]
        VAR _CustomerId = 'orders'[customer_id]
        VAR _EventsForOrder =
          FILTER(
            ALL('marketing_events'),
            'marketing_events'[customer_id] = _CustomerId
              && 'marketing_events'[event_type] IN _EventTypes
              && 'marketing_events'[event_at] <= _OrderDate
              && DATEDIFF('marketing_events'[event_at], _OrderDate, DAY) >= 0
              && DATEDIFF('marketing_events'[event_at], _OrderDate, DAY) <= 14
          )
        VAR _LastEvent =
          TOPN(
            1,
            _EventsForOrder,
            'marketing_events'[event_at],
            DESC
          )
        VAR _CampaignIdFromLastEvent =
          MAXX(
            ADDCOLUMNS(
              _LastEvent,
              "CampaignId", RELATED('marketing_sends'[campaign_id])
            ),
            [CampaignId]
          )
        RETURN
          _CampaignIdFromLastEvent
    )

  // Base campaign-level metrics (revenue, orders, sends, budget)
  VAR _CampaignBaseMetrics =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      VALUES('marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]),
      "campaign_name", MAX('marketing_campaigns'[campaign_name]),
      "Budget", MAX('marketing_campaigns'[budget_eur]),

      // Attributed Revenue (from order_lines[Total Revenue]) for 2025 orders attributed via last-touch
      "Attributed Revenue",
        VAR _CampId_AR = 'marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]
        VAR _OrdersForCamp_AR =
          FILTER(
            _AttributedOrders,
            [AttributedCampaignId] = _CampId_AR
          )
        VAR _OrderIdsForCamp_AR =
          SELECTCOLUMNS(
            _OrdersForCamp_AR,
            "order_id", 'orders'[order_id]
          )
        RETURN
          CALCULATE(
            'order_lines'[Total Revenue],
            TREATAS(_OrderIdsForCamp_AR, 'orders'[order_id])
          ),

      // Attributed Orders (count of 2025 orders with last-touch attribution to this campaign)
      "Attributed Orders",
        VAR _CampId_AO = 'marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]
        VAR _OrdersForCamp_AO =
          FILTER(
            _AttributedOrders,
            [AttributedCampaignId] = _CampId_AO
          )
        RETURN
          COUNTROWS(_OrdersForCamp_AO),

      // Sends in 2025 for this campaign (context transition from campaign row filters via relationship)
      "Sends 2025",
        CALCULATE(
          'marketing_sends'[Total Email Sends],
          YEAR('marketing_sends'[send_at]) = 2025
        )
    )

  // Add derived KPIs: Conversion Rate, ROI, Negative ROI flag
  VAR _CampaignPerf =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      _CampaignBaseMetrics,
      "Conversion Rate",
        VAR _OrdersCnt = [Attributed Orders]
        VAR _SendsCnt = [Sends 2025]
        RETURN
          DIVIDE(_OrdersCnt, _SendsCnt),

      "ROI",
        VAR _Revenue = [Attributed Revenue]
        VAR _Cost = [Budget]
        RETURN
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_Cost) && _Cost <> 0,
            DIVIDE(_Revenue - _Cost, _Cost),
            BLANK()
          ),

      "Negative ROI",
        VAR _Revenue2 = [Attributed Revenue]
        VAR _Cost2 = [Budget]
        VAR _ROI2 =
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_Cost2) && _Cost2 <> 0,
            DIVIDE(_Revenue2 - _Cost2, _Cost2),
            BLANK()
          )
        RETURN
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_ROI2) && _ROI2 < 0,
            TRUE,
            FALSE
          )
    )

  // Top 5 campaigns by Attributed Revenue
  VAR _Top5Campaigns =
    TOPN(
      5,
      _CampaignPerf,
      [Attributed Revenue],
      DESC
    )

EVALUATE
  SELECTCOLUMNS(
    _Top5Campaigns,
    "Campaign Name", [campaign_name],
    "Attributed Revenue", [Attributed Revenue],
    "Sends 2025", [Sends 2025],
    "Conversion Rate", [Conversion Rate],
    "ROI", [ROI],
    "Negative ROI", [Negative ROI]
  )
ORDER BY
  [Attributed Revenue] DESC,
  [Campaign Name] ASC
```"}
function.name: analyze.database.execute

function.arguments: {"query":"List the top 5 marketing campaigns by total attributed revenue in 2025. For each, provide campaign name, attributed revenue, sends, conversion rate (orders/sends), ROI ((revenue-cost)/cost), and indicate if any have negative ROI. Use marketing_campaigns, marketing_events, marketing_sends, marketing_audiences, and commerce_orders tables. Attribution = last-touch, within 14 days of send/open."}

function.output:
All attempts to generate and execute code failed after reaching maximum retries.

The first code candidate tried was:
```dax
// Top 5 marketing campaigns by total attributed revenue in 2025
// Attribution model: Last-touch (open/click) within 14 days before the order date.

DEFINE
  // Helper table for allowed event types in attribution (open, click)
  VAR _EventTypes =
    DATATABLE(
      "event_type",
      STRING,
      {
        { "open" },
        { "click" }
      }
    )

  // Orders in 2025 (completed only)
  VAR _Orders2025 =
    FILTER(
      ALL('orders'),
      YEAR('orders'[order_at]) = 2025
        && 'orders'[status] = "completed"
    )

  // Add last-touch attributed campaign id to each 2025 order
  VAR _AttributedOrders =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      _Orders2025,
      "AttributedCampaignId",
        VAR _OrderDate = 'orders'[order_at]
        VAR _CustomerId = 'orders'[customer_id]
        VAR _EventsForOrder =
          FILTER(
            ALL('marketing_events'),
            'marketing_events'[customer_id] = _CustomerId
              && 'marketing_events'[event_type] IN _EventTypes
              && 'marketing_events'[event_at] <= _OrderDate
              && DATEDIFF('marketing_events'[event_at], _OrderDate, DAY) >= 0
              && DATEDIFF('marketing_events'[event_at], _OrderDate, DAY) <= 14
          )
        VAR _LastEvent =
          TOPN(
            1,
            _EventsForOrder,
            'marketing_events'[event_at],
            DESC
          )
        VAR _CampaignIdFromLastEvent =
          MAXX(
            ADDCOLUMNS(
              _LastEvent,
              "CampaignId", RELATED('marketing_sends'[campaign_id])
            ),
            [CampaignId]
          )
        RETURN
          _CampaignIdFromLastEvent
    )

  // Base campaign-level metrics (revenue, orders, sends, budget)
  VAR _CampaignBaseMetrics =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      VALUES('marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]),
      "campaign_name", MAX('marketing_campaigns'[campaign_name]),
      "Budget", MAX('marketing_campaigns'[budget_eur]),

      // Attributed Revenue (from order_lines[Total Revenue]) for 2025 orders attributed via last-touch
      "Attributed Revenue",
        VAR _CampId_AR = 'marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]
        VAR _OrdersForCamp_AR =
          FILTER(
            _AttributedOrders,
            [AttributedCampaignId] = _CampId_AR
          )
        VAR _OrderIdsForCamp_AR =
          SELECTCOLUMNS(
            _OrdersForCamp_AR,
            "order_id", 'orders'[order_id]
          )
        RETURN
          CALCULATE(
            'order_lines'[Total Revenue],
            TREATAS(_OrderIdsForCamp_AR, 'orders'[order_id])
          ),

      // Attributed Orders (count of 2025 orders with last-touch attribution to this campaign)
      "Attributed Orders",
        VAR _CampId_AO = 'marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]
        VAR _OrdersForCamp_AO =
          FILTER(
            _AttributedOrders,
            [AttributedCampaignId] = _CampId_AO
          )
        RETURN
          COUNTROWS(_OrdersForCamp_AO),

      // Sends in 2025 for this campaign (context transition from campaign row filters via relationship)
      "Sends 2025",
        CALCULATE(
          'marketing_sends'[Total Email Sends],
          YEAR('marketing_sends'[send_at]) = 2025
        )
    )

  // Add derived KPIs: Conversion Rate, ROI, Negative ROI flag
  VAR _CampaignPerf =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      _CampaignBaseMetrics,
      "Conversion Rate",
        VAR _OrdersCnt = [Attributed Orders]
        VAR _SendsCnt = [Sends 2025]
        RETURN
          DIVIDE(_OrdersCnt, _SendsCnt),

      "ROI",
        VAR _Revenue = [Attributed Revenue]
        VAR _Cost = [Budget]
        RETURN
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_Cost) && _Cost <> 0,
            DIVIDE(_Revenue - _Cost, _Cost),
            BLANK()
          ),

      "Negative ROI",
        VAR _Revenue2 = [Attributed Revenue]
        VAR _Cost2 = [Budget]
        VAR _ROI2 =
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_Cost2) && _Cost2 <> 0,
            DIVIDE(_Revenue2 - _Cost2, _Cost2),
            BLANK()
          )
        RETURN
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_ROI2) && _ROI2 < 0,
            TRUE,
            FALSE
          )
    )

  // Top 5 campaigns by Attributed Revenue
  VAR _Top5Campaigns =
    TOPN(
      5,
      _CampaignPerf,
      [Attributed Revenue],
      DESC
    )

EVALUATE
  SELECTCOLUMNS(
    _Top5Campaigns,
    "Campaign Name", [campaign_name],
    "Attributed Revenue", [Attributed Revenue],
    "Sends 2025", [Sends 2025],
    "Conversion Rate", [Conversion Rate],
    "ROI", [ROI],
    "Negative ROI", [Negative ROI]
  )
ORDER BY
  [Attributed Revenue] DESC,
  [Campaign Name] ASC

function.name: analyze.database.nl2code
function.output:
# Variation 1

```dax
// Top 5 marketing campaigns by total attributed revenue in 2025
// Attribution model: Last-touch (open/click) within 14 days before the order date.

DEFINE
  // Helper table for allowed event types in attribution (open, click)
  VAR _EventTypes =
    DATATABLE(
      "event_type",
      STRING,
      {
        { "open" },
        { "click" }
      }
    )

  // Orders in 2025 (completed only)
  VAR _Orders2025 =
    FILTER(
      ALL('orders'),
      YEAR('orders'[order_at]) = 2025
        && 'orders'[status] = "completed"
    )

  // Add last-touch attributed campaign id to each 2025 order
  VAR _AttributedOrders =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      _Orders2025,
      "AttributedCampaignId",
        VAR _OrderDate = 'orders'[order_at]
        VAR _CustomerId = 'orders'[customer_id]
        VAR _EventsForOrder =
          FILTER(
            ALL('marketing_events'),
            'marketing_events'[customer_id] = _CustomerId
              && 'marketing_events'[event_type] IN _EventTypes
              && 'marketing_events'[event_at] <= _OrderDate
              && DATEDIFF('marketing_events'[event_at], _OrderDate, DAY) >= 0
              && DATEDIFF('marketing_events'[event_at], _OrderDate, DAY) <= 14
          )
        VAR _LastEvent =
          TOPN(
            1,
            _EventsForOrder,
            'marketing_events'[event_at],
            DESC
          )
        VAR _CampaignIdFromLastEvent =
          MAXX(
            ADDCOLUMNS(
              _LastEvent,
              "CampaignId", RELATED('marketing_sends'[campaign_id])
            ),
            [CampaignId]
          )
        RETURN
          _CampaignIdFromLastEvent
    )

  // Base campaign-level metrics (revenue, orders, sends, budget)
  VAR _CampaignBaseMetrics =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      VALUES('marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]),
      "campaign_name", MAX('marketing_campaigns'[campaign_name]),
      "Budget", MAX('marketing_campaigns'[budget_eur]),

      // Attributed Revenue (from order_lines[Total Revenue]) for 2025 orders attributed via last-touch
      "Attributed Revenue",
        VAR _CampId_AR = 'marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]
        VAR _OrdersForCamp_AR =
          FILTER(
            _AttributedOrders,
            [AttributedCampaignId] = _CampId_AR
          )
        VAR _OrderIdsForCamp_AR =
          SELECTCOLUMNS(
            _OrdersForCamp_AR,
            "order_id", 'orders'[order_id]
          )
        RETURN
          CALCULATE(
            'order_lines'[Total Revenue],
            TREATAS(_OrderIdsForCamp_AR, 'orders'[order_id])
          ),

      // Attributed Orders (count of 2025 orders with last-touch attribution to this campaign)
      "Attributed Orders",
        VAR _CampId_AO = 'marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]
        VAR _OrdersForCamp_AO =
          FILTER(
            _AttributedOrders,
            [AttributedCampaignId] = _CampId_AO
          )
        RETURN
          COUNTROWS(_OrdersForCamp_AO),

      // Sends in 2025 for this campaign (context transition from campaign row filters via relationship)
      "Sends 2025",
        CALCULATE(
          'marketing_sends'[Total Email Sends],
          YEAR('marketing_sends'[send_at]) = 2025
        )
    )

  // Add derived KPIs: Conversion Rate, ROI, Negative ROI flag
  VAR _CampaignPerf =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      _CampaignBaseMetrics,
      "Conversion Rate",
        VAR _OrdersCnt = [Attributed Orders]
        VAR _SendsCnt = [Sends 2025]
        RETURN
          DIVIDE(_OrdersCnt, _SendsCnt),

      "ROI",
        VAR _Revenue = [Attributed Revenue]
        VAR _Cost = [Budget]
        RETURN
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_Cost) && _Cost <> 0,
            DIVIDE(_Revenue - _Cost, _Cost),
            BLANK()
          ),

      "Negative ROI",
        VAR _Revenue2 = [Attributed Revenue]
        VAR _Cost2 = [Budget]
        VAR _ROI2 =
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_Cost2) && _Cost2 <> 0,
            DIVIDE(_Revenue2 - _Cost2, _Cost2),
            BLANK()
          )
        RETURN
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_ROI2) && _ROI2 < 0,
            TRUE,
            FALSE
          )
    )

  // Top 5 campaigns by Attributed Revenue
  VAR _Top5Campaigns =
    TOPN(
      5,
      _CampaignPerf,
      [Attributed Revenue],
      DESC
    )

EVALUATE
  SELECTCOLUMNS(
    _Top5Campaigns,
    "Campaign Name", [campaign_name],
    "Attributed Revenue", [Attributed Revenue],
    "Sends 2025", [Sends 2025],
    "Conversion Rate", [Conversion Rate],
    "ROI", [ROI],
    "Negative ROI", [Negative ROI]
  )
ORDER BY
  [Attributed Revenue] DESC,
  [Campaign Name] ASC
```

diagnostic_details.natural_language_query: List the top 5 marketing campaigns by total attributed revenue in 2025. For each, provide campaign name, attributed revenue, sends, conversion rate (orders/sends), ROI ((revenue-cost)/cost), and indicate if any have negative ROI. Use marketing_campaigns, marketing_events, marketing_sends, marketing_audiences, and commerce_orders tables. Attribution = last-touch, within 14 days of send/open.
diagnostic_details.nl2sa_response:
{
  "answer": {
    "nodes": [
      {
        "id": "root1",
        "parts": [
          {
            "partType": "daxQuery",
            "id": "daxQuery1",
            "daxQuery": {
              "query": "// Top 5 marketing campaigns by total attributed revenue in 2025
// Attribution model: Last-touch (open/click) within 14 days before the order date.

DEFINE
  // Helper table for allowed event types in attribution (open, click)
  VAR _EventTypes =
    DATATABLE(
      "event_type",
      STRING,
      {
        { "open" },
        { "click" }
      }
    )

  // Orders in 2025 (completed only)
  VAR _Orders2025 =
    FILTER(
      ALL('orders'),
      YEAR('orders'[order_at]) = 2025
        && 'orders'[status] = "completed"
    )

  // Add last-touch attributed campaign id to each 2025 order
  VAR _AttributedOrders =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      _Orders2025,
      "AttributedCampaignId",
        VAR _OrderDate = 'orders'[order_at]
        VAR _CustomerId = 'orders'[customer_id]
        VAR _EventsForOrder =
          FILTER(
            ALL('marketing_events'),
            'marketing_events'[customer_id] = _CustomerId
              && 'marketing_events'[event_type] IN _EventTypes
              && 'marketing_events'[event_at] <= _OrderDate
              && DATEDIFF('marketing_events'[event_at], _OrderDate, DAY) >= 0
              && DATEDIFF('marketing_events'[event_at], _OrderDate, DAY) <= 14
          )
        VAR _LastEvent =
          TOPN(
            1,
            _EventsForOrder,
            'marketing_events'[event_at],
            DESC
          )
        VAR _CampaignIdFromLastEvent =
          MAXX(
            ADDCOLUMNS(
              _LastEvent,
              "CampaignId", RELATED('marketing_sends'[campaign_id])
            ),
            [CampaignId]
          )
        RETURN
          _CampaignIdFromLastEvent
    )

  // Base campaign-level metrics (revenue, orders, sends, budget)
  VAR _CampaignBaseMetrics =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      VALUES('marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]),
      "campaign_name", MAX('marketing_campaigns'[campaign_name]),
      "Budget", MAX('marketing_campaigns'[budget_eur]),

      // Attributed Revenue (from order_lines[Total Revenue]) for 2025 orders attributed via last-touch
      "Attributed Revenue",
        VAR _CampId_AR = 'marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]
        VAR _OrdersForCamp_AR =
          FILTER(
            _AttributedOrders,
            [AttributedCampaignId] = _CampId_AR
          )
        VAR _OrderIdsForCamp_AR =
          SELECTCOLUMNS(
            _OrdersForCamp_AR,
            "order_id", 'orders'[order_id]
          )
        RETURN
          CALCULATE(
            'order_lines'[Total Revenue],
            TREATAS(_OrderIdsForCamp_AR, 'orders'[order_id])
          ),

      // Attributed Orders (count of 2025 orders with last-touch attribution to this campaign)
      "Attributed Orders",
        VAR _CampId_AO = 'marketing_campaigns'[campaign_id]
        VAR _OrdersForCamp_AO =
          FILTER(
            _AttributedOrders,
            [AttributedCampaignId] = _CampId_AO
          )
        RETURN
          COUNTROWS(_OrdersForCamp_AO),

      // Sends in 2025 for this campaign (context transition from campaign row filters via relationship)
      "Sends 2025",
        CALCULATE(
          'marketing_sends'[Total Email Sends],
          YEAR('marketing_sends'[send_at]) = 2025
        )
    )

  // Add derived KPIs: Conversion Rate, ROI, Negative ROI flag
  VAR _CampaignPerf =
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      _CampaignBaseMetrics,
      "Conversion Rate",
        VAR _OrdersCnt = [Attributed Orders]
        VAR _SendsCnt = [Sends 2025]
        RETURN
          DIVIDE(_OrdersCnt, _SendsCnt),

      "ROI",
        VAR _Revenue = [Attributed Revenue]
        VAR _Cost = [Budget]
        RETURN
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_Cost) && _Cost <> 0,
            DIVIDE(_Revenue - _Cost, _Cost),
            BLANK()
          ),

      "Negative ROI",
        VAR _Revenue2 = [Attributed Revenue]
        VAR _Cost2 = [Budget]
        VAR _ROI2 =
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_Cost2) && _Cost2 <> 0,
            DIVIDE(_Revenue2 - _Cost2, _Cost2),
            BLANK()
          )
        RETURN
          IF(
            NOT ISBLANK(_ROI2) && _ROI2 < 0,
            TRUE,
            FALSE
          )
    )

  // Top 5 campaigns by Attributed Revenue
  VAR _Top5Campaigns =
    TOPN(
      5,
      _CampaignPerf,
      [Attributed Revenue],
      DESC
    )

EVALUATE
  SELECTCOLUMNS(
    _Top5Campaigns,
    "Campaign Name", [campaign_name],
    "Attributed Revenue", [Attributed Revenue],
    "Sends 2025", [Sends 2025],
    "Conversion Rate", [Conversion Rate],
    "ROI", [ROI],
    "Negative ROI", [Negative ROI]
  )
ORDER BY

  [Campaign Name] ASC",
